Here's what investors missed today.

The headline drop masked a two-speed market: heavyweight IT exporters dragged the benchmarks while domestic-facing sectors (realty, consumer durables, autos) and broader midcap/smallcap segments held firm, signaling that the weakness was sector-specific rather than
